scanInstructions: Point the camera at the worker's QR code
pageSubtitle: Scan QR code at the store
pointCameraDesc: Point your camera at the QR code at the store
instruction1: Find the QR code at the counter or poster
instruction2: Open camera and point at the QR frame
instruction3: System automatically records check-in or check-out
scanQrAtRestaurant: Scan QR code at the restaurant to end your shift
pressToScan: Press the button below to start scanning
ownerInstruction1: Ask the worker to show their QR code on the app
ownerInstruction2: Press "Start scanning" and point the camera at the QR code
ownerInstruction3: The system will automatically record check-in/check-out
qrOwnQr: This is your QR code. Workers need to scan this, not you.
qrNoWorkerInfo: QR code contains no worker information
qrNotYourJob: This job does not belong to your restaurant
cooldownError: Please wait 2 seconds before scanning again
